releases.label: GR6/GR7
releases.summary: Final mission pipeline release at MAST. GALEX observed 2003-07-07 to 2012-02-07 (FUV detector ceased 2009); the Merged Catalog of Sources (MCAT) combines FUV/NUV SExtractor detections. Post-mission CAUSE observations partially available at MAST.

releases.label: GUVcat_AIS (GR6+7)
releases.summary: Revised catalog of unique GALEX UV sources from the All-Sky Imaging Survey — 82,992,086 sources over 24,790 deg2, typical depth FUV=19.9 / NUV=20.8 ABmag, with artifact flags and extended-object footprint tags; the recommended science catalog for GALEX AIS
